caption: A man with distinctive silver-blonde spiked hair, glasses, and over-ear headphones is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a professional black microphone. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt paired with a red bowtie and yellow suspenders. In the background, a woman with pink hair wearing a green top is visible, standing near a wall with a framed yellow shield logo and a sign that reads "UNIQUE FASHION". On the left side of the screen, a logo for "THE TALK PODCAST" is present, and on the right, red text reads "THE TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a profile view, speaking and slightly shifting his head and facial expression while remaining in the same position. The background and equipment remain static, capturing a consistent shot of the podcast recording session.
